message:
feat(daemon): implement RestoreSnapshot with ZFS rollback

- Add ZFS manager to DashboardFacade for snapshot operations
- CreateSnapshot now actually creates ZFS snapshots (requires VMID)
- RestoreSnapshot stops running VM and rolls back ZFS dataset
- Add proper error handling for missing VMID or ZFS manager
- Update tests to cover new error conditions

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
